name: cozy
description: Morning wellness ritual with warm tea, a yoga mat in soft light, and the peaceful start of a mindful day. This mood positions supplements as part of a holistic self-care routine — not just pills, but a daily act of caring for yourself.

style.lighting: warm sunrise glow | soft morning window light | gentle ambient warmth
style.color_grade: warm green and gold tones | soft honeydew highlights | gentle morning palette
style.camera: close-up morning routine | medium shot wellness ritual | slow observational dolly
style.composition: supplement as part of routine scene | morning ritual sequence | peaceful personal space
style.props: yoga mat, herbal tea, supplement bottle on nightstand, journal, sunrise view, diffuser

copy_tone: Calm and mindful, like a guided meditation script. Uses sensory language about how wellness feels, not just what it does. 'Start your morning with intention.' Warmth and care in every word.

music.mood: ambient meditation, soft nature sounds, gentle singing bowls

example_prompt_fragment: A serene morning wellness scene, a hand reaching for a GAIA Supplements bottle on a wooden nightstand beside herbal tea, warm sunrise light streaming through sheer curtains, yoga mat rolled in the corner, journal open with a pen resting on it, warm green and honeydew color palette, peaceful mindful lifestyle photography
